snippet.title: MUTTON BONE MARROW | Chettinad Mutton Bone Marrow Cooking and Eating in Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook 100+ mutton bone marrow with the traditional Chettinad method. Mutton bone marrow is one of the tastiest piece in the mutton recipe. 

We collect a huge amount of bone marrow to make this mutton recipe.

We enjoy this traditionally cooked mutton bone recipe with our mutton gravy.

snippet.title: Zaiba's Birthday-ക്ക് ജനങ്ങൾ കൊടുത്ത SURPRISE 😱🤩
snippet.description:
We are sooo happy, especially our zaiba mol. Yesterday she was so thrilled to receive her surprise birthday party, which was organised by family wedding center. snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Zomato Delivery Boy Explained | Tamil | Madan Gowri | MG
snippet.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
This Madan Gowri video is a video about a Zomato delivery boy in Bangalore that became big viral news, regarding delayed delivery of food. We will be fact-checking what really the story behind the Zomato delivery boy and the Bangalore customer girl if it was really, was about delivery food delay.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMedia’s direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMedia’s rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: Chambdi Baba Bhagaye Bhoot | RajKummar Rao | Janhvi Kapoor | Varun Sharma | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Lo bhai aa gaya humara ek aur bollywood collab after ages
Roohi is releasing on 11th March
ONLY AND ONLY IN CINEMAS
JAANA AUR ZAROOR DEKHNA
Bhai maza aa gaya ye waale video mein kyunki apne iss video mein hai Rajkummar bhaiya, Varun bhai aur Janhvi Kapoor
Toh hum log jab goa mein apni mara rahe the tab apne @JioStudios  aur @Maddock Films  waalo ne apne ko bola ki bhai ek acha saa video bana na hai roohi ke star cast ke saath, waise toh bollywood collabs karna kaafi kamm kar diye hai (time nai re abhi ACV team ke paas, kaun mumbai jaye Ulhasnagar se😂😂) lekin ye waali star cast mein apne Raj bhai hai, jo actor ke roop mein kuch zyada hi ache insaan hai❤️ aur Varun Sharma ke saath toh apna pehle rishta tha
Toh hum mana nai kar paye
Plus Janhvi pe apun ko crush tha 😂😂
Upar se film ke producer Dinesh Vijan bhi kaafi respectful aur pyaare the, toh jab bhi bollywood se ache humble log milte (jo rare hota hai😂😂) humara dil kehta ki inke saath toh kaam karna hi chahiye
Islie bas humne kuch darawani movies dekhi apne bhootiyapa ko badaya aur ye script likhi jo hai chambdi baba ka part 2
Ye waala video end tak zaroor dekhna kyunki isme bahut masti hai aur kaafi zyada improvisation hai (all thanks to legend RAJKUMMAR RAO)
Production :
@Jashan Sirwani  , @Tanish Sirwani  , @Ritesh Sadhwani  toh hamesha hi hote hai
Is baar @Rohit Sadhwani  aur Grishim bhi chale kyunki bollywood ka collab tha, waise harami ke bache 2 din call nai uthate 
Main ek whatsapp kiya ki Rajkummar Rao se milne jaa rahe
Ghar ke neeche pahuch gaye saale
Iski script maine aur @Jashan Sirwani  ne saath mein likhi hai kyunki @Kunal Chhabhria  mc ko Ambernath se Ulhasnagar aane mein bhi bahut time lagta hai
Traffic ne dhanda kharab kar diya hai
Shoot humara Cinderella @Siddharth Kedare aur @Kunal Chhabhria ne kiya kyunki camera inke paas girvi rehta hai... bhadepe chalate hai aur kamate hai, mujhse paise nahi lete hai iss liye inko jhelna padta hai.
Baaki humara super super thanks to
Jio Studios jinhone hume phone karke ijjat di😂
Maddock films jinhone saamne se humari ijjat cheeni nahi😂
Rajkummar Rao jinse bahut saari cheeze seekhni ko mili, jaise ki jitna zyada talented banda utna kam ghamand🔥
Varun Sharma jinki comic timing aur expression meri acting distract kar rahi thi
Aur Janhvi Kapoor jinki maine raj bhai aur Varun bhai ne bahuuut taang kheechi 😂😂
All in all maza aa gaya please ye movie cinemas ke jaake zaroor dekhna
ROOHI IS RELEASING ON 11TH MARCH❤️

#Roohi #11thMarch #AshishChanchlani #RajKummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #MaddockFilms #JioStudios

Mai Khaama kha 
Chala chala aur badhta gaya

Toh keh do na
Hume aach toh dedo na 
Ek baat toh chedo na
Jazbaat mein kho le na

O meri heer

Chal na rula 
Na kar aafra 
Labrez kar na
Aa bhi ja

Dil mera
kuwara dil mera x4

Feeki feeki zindagani
Bhar de tu fagun ke rang sare
rang sare
Pran mere

Andhiyari kaari ratein 
Kar de tu poonam ki 
Ujiyare ujiyare 
Jaan mere

Jaan mere pran mere 
Agaaz kar unwan de 
Anjam de kuch naam de 
Iss geet ko pehchaan le

Mai Khaama kha 
Chala chala aur badhta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya 

O meri heer

saari kaynaat muskuraaye

Kaynaat 

Mai Khaama kha

mr.title: भावंडं आणि भांडणं | फिट. पार्थ भालेराव आणि रितिका श्रोत्री | #bhadipa
mr.description:
जी एकमेकांसोबत राहू शकत नाही आणि एकमेकांशिवाय सुद्धा राहू शकत नाही, तीच तर असतात भावंडं! हे जगातभारी नातं सर्व नात्यांच्या पलीकडे असतं. पाहा अशाच एका भावा-बहिणीची भन्नाट भांडणं ह्या नवीन व्हिडिओ मध्ये.
अशा अजून काँटेंट साठी #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा. 

श्रेयावली

कलाकार
पार्थ भालेराव
रितिका श्रोत्री

दिग्दर्शन - सागरिका जोशी
लेखन - कल्पक भावे
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - सायली पाटील
क्रिएटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - अभय राऊत
छायांकन - चैतन्य रक्षक
ध्वनी - मलय वडाळकर
प्रोडक्शन मॅनेजर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
रनर - मंगेश दादा
स्पॉट 1 - शिव दादा
केटरींग - दर्पणा शितुत
संपादन - अनुजा भंडारे
सोशल मीडिया - अनिकेत जाधव, पूजा परब, तन्वी कुलकर्णी, रिचा जवळेकर
क्रिएटिव्हस् - प्राजक्ता नेवाळकर

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: Feel the Power -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'Feel the Power', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Watch and listen to this energetic and unforgettable track composed by Thaman S that'll make you 'Feel The Power.'

Putting up a pompous show led by Puneeth Rajkumar, Jaani Master's style will keep you hooked to the screen. With a perky musical score, Feel The Power shall mark a new era.  
Shashank Sheshagiri's voice, Santhosh Ananddram's lyrics will leave you with a fantastic experience. 

See, Share, and make it a part of your music playlists! Get a load of more such Kannada videos, Kannada songs, and Kannada cinema updates by subscribing to Hombale Films YouTube Channel.
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

snippet.title: Punjab schools to shut again| ਪੰਜਾਬ 'ਚ ਸਕੂਲਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਮੁੜ ਲੱਗਿਆ ਤਾਲਾ
snippet.description:
ਚੰਡੀਗੜ੍ਹ : ਪੰਜਾਬ ‘ਚ ਕੋਰੋਨਾ ਵਾਇਰਸ ਦੇ ਮਾਮਲੇ ਇਕ ਵਾਰ ਫਿਰ ਵਧਣੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਹੋ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ਜਿਸ ਕਰਕੇ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਰਕਾਰ ਨੇ ਮੁੜ ਸੂਬੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਖ਼ਤੀ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤੀ ਹੈ। ਅਜਿਹੇ ‘ਚ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਵਿਭਾਗ ਵੱਲੋਂ ਵੀ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਦੇ ਸਕੂਲਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਮੁੜ ਤਾਲਾ ਲਗਾਉਣ ਦਾ ਫ਼ੈਸਲਾ ਲਿਆ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

Read more: https://bit.ly/3te3qBa

Punjab schools to shut again

snippet.title: Highlights - Mumbai City FC 2-1 ATK Mohun Bagan - Final | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
Mumbai City FC beat ATK Mohun Bagan 2-1 in the 2020-21 #HeroISLFinal to win their first-ever #HeroISL trophy! 

David Williams broke the deadlock in the 18th minute but an unfortunate own goal from Tiri brought the Islanders level just before the half-hour mark. The match appeared to be headed for extra-time but Bartholomew Ogbeche made the most of an error from the Mariners' backline and set up Bipin Singh for the match-winning goal!

That result saw Mumbai City FC become the fourth different champion in the tournament's history and also the first team to do the double! 

Tell us your favourite moment from what was an exciting contest at the Fatorda Stadium!

#MCFCATKMB #LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

To subscribe, click - https://bit.ly/35AzdBp

For all the latest news & updates on Hero ISL, visit - http://bit.ly/HeroISLWeb

snippet.title: Above All (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021 | Punjabi Songs
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents New Punjabi Song of 2021 Above All By Jassa Dhillon Ft Gur Sidhu.

Listen to Above All on all audio streaming platforms: https://jassadhillon.bfan.link/above-all.yde

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1nVZq7TGWWHfmKGeo535zJ

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/above-all-single/1555513749

Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/song/above-all/bl_A10320WT038216940Z

JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/above-all/DezXJDIRVyY_

Gaana: https://gaana.com/album/above-all-punjabi-1

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/album/above-all/62904995/

YT Music: https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_nN4BQHMgqU02zuv_n3JZ_rOojJ1WwGLrg

Amazon: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08XJKMTW6?ref=dm_sh_F1WtlG6YkVIE1EQE2ufA24A2A


Track Credits:
Title: Above All
Singer: Jassa Dhillon Ft Gur Sidhu
Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: J Statik
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Ishika & Manisha
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions
Edit  : GS Bhari 
Colour Grading : Prashant B Dhotre
Vfx by - Amit P Sharma
Special Thanks - Big Media & YGD Media
Producer - Nav Sandhu
Label : Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri
Media Promotions: Cross Media

Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta​

Lyrics:

Kon kahinda jatt maade aa hunde,
Vair paye maade bass jatta de,
Chande aa gandase rahinde,
Bulliya te haase rahinde,
Gaira vich khof rahinda,
Khade velly paase rahinde , 
utre dunaali vicho chopra te charde,

Arde ni gabbru ta jahra vicho vadd de,
Yaar te pyaar piche moohre hoke lad de,
Harde na yaar sohniye raule mukde na hunde kade vatta de,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de,


Ucchiya udaariya ,niviya farrariya,
Dass keda sher jithe mallan naio mariya,
24x 7 lohr aa ni vakhri g tohr aa,
Ni nave terе shehar ch puraanya te jor aa,
Bharde na takk balliyе vajj de aa fair jado patta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de


Gur Sidhu Music
Tattiya taseera ne , piche piche heera ne,
Sadde utte hath kude pakkya fakeera de,
Pale aa tufana vich , jamme aa mayan vich,
Tikkhe nale tez kude jive shamsheera ne,
Banya vajood sada todya ni jana,
Haqqa piche lade jatt modya ni,
Vakap ne saare keda janda ni dhillon nu,
Gutt kabbi khana toh marodya ni jana ,
pahila jede saan vajde , 
picho chalde bhaar kahinde latta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa ,
hunde vair paaye maade bass jatta de,


Dass keda aa vangarda , hune jatt thalda,
Mosam de saab naa ldaayi munda bhalda,
Mare na zameer kyoki ziddi jatt jyonde ne,
Ginti ch nio heere gaddara ch aunde ne,
Mode arrbi bandook awe teda takk na,
Kammm hustle aundi jithe aunda lakh na,
Jado jado jatt jud Saab lagde ne bottla de datta de , 
kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

snippet.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Official Trailer | Episode 1 out on 15th March
snippet.description:
The trio is back with Operation MBBS Season 2 💥
A year full of laughs, tears and goosebumps with Nishant, Huma & Sakshi. 
Will they be able to survive this second year of medical college? 

Here's presenting India's first web series dedicated to the duty and sacrifice by our doctors and frontline warriors 💖

Find out on 15th March, 2021. Stay tuned 📅
#AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

#DiceOperationMBBS2 presented by  @Unacademy NEET  #LetsCrackIt

snippet.title: சீ S01 E01 - இந்த உலகமே குருடாய் போன கால கட்டத்திலும் போர்!  Mr Tamilan TV series Dubbed Review
snippet.description:
ஸ்பார்ட்டகஸ், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cms3J7yd-PZw6i8yvxvRVsL0 

கேம் ஆப் த்ரோன் எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvQJVpgEhGHzhWYkIwv-K79 

மணி ஹெய்ஸ்ட், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvIDmOkZOfaASz7isTkqQC0 

சூப்பர் நேச்சுரல், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmuUrBMYJqojFflA4u3ccegx

உலக சினிமா உள்ளூர் மொழியில். There are 80 million people who speaks Tamil language. But only half population knows English. How they will taste the world of Hollywood TV Series? as not all foreign language TV series are being dubbed in Tamil. So, We are just reviewing TV series in Tamil language for those Tamil people who don't know English.

In this Mr Tamilan SERIES channel, we will cover the following genre TV Series

Fantasy TV Series
Horror TV Series
Action TV Series
Adventure TV Series
Science-Fiction TV Series
Historic TV Series
Comedy TV Series

If you would like to remove any clips i have used in this video, send a email to slicemind@gmail.com and your clips will be removed immediately. We have invested lot of time and effort to raise this channel. Please don't give copyright strike, instead ask me to remove your clips or raise a copyright claim to get the advertisement revenue. I am happy to give the revenue to you.

snippet.title: Gokuldham वासी हुए घर में बंद! - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashma-तारक मेहता- Ep 3121-12th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-calls-the-police-1000110953?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3121: Bhogilal Tries To Run Away
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal locked Everyone inside Jethalal's house and called the police. Bhogilal tries to run away but someone from Gokuldham has punctured his car and while Bhogilal and his lawyer reach the society's main gate Tapu Sena caught him. Can Jethalal save his Land and money?  Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Episode 3121: Bhogilal Tries To Run Away
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal locked Everyone inside Jethalal's house and called the police. Bhogilal tries to run away but someone from Gokuldham has punctured his car and while Bhogilal and his lawyer reach the society's main gate Tapu Sena caught him. Can Jethalal save his Land and money?  Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

After this long journey as a dance crew, with your love and support, we are now here as the “First Indian Boy Band”. The singers are none other than the band members Kartik, Rohit, and Dennis. snippet.description:
Sarabjeet and the children get ecstatic to meet Meher as the doorbell rings. But the expression of shock covers their faces as soon as they see what's on the other side of the door. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #ChotiSarrdaarni

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Meher is coerced by her mother into marrying Sarabjeet, a widower with a 5 year-old child. But, much to her mother’s dislike, Meher is pregnant with her lover, Manav’s child. Can she stand up for her love and fight her own? This is the journey of a strong-willed woman who makes her own rules and stands by them, come what may. Naag se badh kar Naagin, Sher se badh kar Sherni aur Sardar se badh kar Choti Sarrdaarni! Watch the fiercely independent sardani take on the world and protect her family in Choti Sarrdaarni.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Episode 745 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th March 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

#Colors0fHappiness
#HappilacWipeout

#KhudaAurMohabbatEP06Teaser

snippet.title: Agnishikha - Full Episode | 12 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Agnishikha" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Agnishika: Sikha is an innocent naïve tribal girl, who is the Star of her village Baghshundi. Sikha has respect for her traditions. Vikram visits Shikha’s village and unknowingly participates in some rituals with her, which according to her tribe is a marriage ceremony. So when Shikha’s community goes back to Bikram to ask him to accept her as his wife, Bikram denies the same because he was totally unaware of the whole scenario

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 12 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

snippet.title: महाशिवरात्रि की रात ये गलती न करें | Don't Do This Mistake | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
इस महाशिवरात्रि पर सद्गुरु 10 लाख से ज़्यादा रुद्राक्ष प्राण-प्रतिष्ठित करेंगे। यह रुद्राक्ष और दूसरी सामग्रियां सभी साधकों को फ्री भेंट की जाएंगी, जिससे उन्हें साधना में मदद मिलेगी। रुद्राक्ष प्राप्त करने के लिए इस लिंक पर जाकर रजिस्टर करें : https://isha.co/Rudraksh-Hin

एक योगी, युगदृष्टा, मानवतावादी, सद्‌गुरु एक आधुनिक गुरु हैं, जिनको योग के प्राचीन विज्ञान पर पूर्ण अधिकार है। विश्व शांति और खुशहाली की दिशा में निरंतर काम कर रहे सद्‌गुरु के रूपांतरणकारी कार्यक्रमों से दुनिया के करोडों लोगों को एक नई दिशा मिली है। दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को आनंद के मार्ग में दीक्षित किया गया है।

snippet.title: 12 MP Camera 48MP Se Jyada Accha Kaise Hai? Can We Judge A Camera Only By Megapixel? - AMF Ep 17
snippet.description:
Can we judge a smartphone camera only by megapixel? What other factors matters the most other than resolution?

Let us explore this in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore different amazing facts related to science, astronomy, finance, technology and various general facts. This is the episode 17 of AMF.

snippet.title: Flying Alone In Emirates First Class🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Namaskaar Dosto, yeh ek bahut hi shandaar video hai jaha pe maine aapse baat ki hai mere ultimate experience ki Emirates First Class mein, yaha pe main akela passenger tha poori First Class mein jaha pe maine share kiya mera travelling experience Delhi se Dubai tak aur maine Emirates First Class mein Internet speed bhi check ki jaha pe satellite internet ki bhi bahut kamaal speeds thi. snippet.title: LIFE-CHANGING Hacks and DIYs You Will Want To Try
snippet.description:
Brilliant and easy hacks that will change your life for the better
Are you guys ready to get decorating? Today, we’re getting crafty together, and we’ll help you make your home sparkle. Sometimes home decorations can be pricey because they’re considered a luxury and not a necessity. And if you’re on a budget, they’re hard to afford. To help you out, we show you some brilliant recycling and repurposing hacks where you can create your own decorations using items you already have lying around. The best part is that they’re all free.
Watch until the end to see how to decorate a floor lamp and make your own bowls and different crafts you can make with cement.
Timestamps: 
1:04 – How to repurpose an old guitar.
1:31 – Great decoration using popsicle sticks.
2:36 – A great new use for an old sitting stool
3:37 – How to recycle an old plastic bottle.
4:32 – Great DIY bowl using cement and lace.
5:11 – A great recycling craft using an old car tire
6:15 – How to repurpose a broken picture frame
7:29 – An excellent use for broken tiles
10:05 – Cool floor lamp decoration 
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: गर्मियों में स्वेटशर्ट कैसे पहनें? 1 SWEATSHIRT in 6 WAYS | Komal Pandey
snippet.description:
Hello everyone, 

I know some people very close to me who literally do and want to do everything in a sweatshirt. They enjoy style but with a whole lot of comfort. I styled my fav sweatshirt in 6 ways and enjoyed it so much. THIS IS HOW you could also elevate your sweatshirt and still look relax. 

Ummeed karti hun ki aapko yeh video pasand aaye. 

Love, 
Komal 

OUTFIT DETAILS: 
Look 1:
sweatshirt- Levis 
tropical print shirt- Zara
bermuda shorts- Zara
Look 2: 
Pants & bag- Zara
Look 3: 
cycling shorts- Zara
bag-  Mistry
Look 4: 
Blue jacket- Yavi
Bag- thrift_india on instgram
Jeans- Zara
Look 5:
skirt- very old Zara
bikini top flossed around the waist- Zara
Look 6:
Scarf- @rerun.n on Instagram 
bag- Zara
sunglasses- VOGUE eyewear
